% ============================================================
% RESUME TEMPLATE — Luann Luna
% ============================================================
%
% SOURCE OF TRUTH: resume-en.md
% GENERATED FILES: resume-en.tex (English), resume-pt.tex (Portuguese)
%
% HOW TO USE:
%   Copy this file and replace every %%PLACEHOLDER%% with the
%   appropriate content for the target language. Refer to the
%   PLACEHOLDER REFERENCE section below for guidance.
%
% COMPILATION:
%   xelatex resume-en.tex   (or resume-pt.tex)
%   Run twice to resolve cross-references.
%   Use `make en`, `make pt`, or `make all` via the Makefile.
%
% PLACEHOLDER REFERENCE:
%
%   %%LANG_SETUP%%
%       EN  → (empty — remove this line entirely)
%       PT  → \usepackage{polyglossia}
%              \setmainlanguage{portuguese}
%
%   %%PDF_TITLE%%
%       EN  → Luann Luna - Resume
%       PT  → Luann Luna - Currículo
%
%   %%PDF_SUBJECT%%
%       EN  → Resume
%       PT  → Currículo
%
%   %%PDF_KEYWORDS%%
%       EN  → iOS, Software Engineer, Swift
%       PT  → iOS, Engenheiro de Software, Swift
%
%   %%HEADER_LOCATION%%
%       EN  → São Luís, Brazil (GMT-3) $|$ Remote US/EU/LATAM overlap
%       PT  → São Luís, Brasil (GMT-3) $|$ Remoto com overlap US/EU/LATAM
%
%   %%HEADER_TITLE%%
%       EN  → Senior iOS Software Engineer
%       PT  → Senior iOS Software Engineer   (keep in English)
%
%   %%SECTION_SUMMARY%%
%       EN  → Professional Summary
%       PT  → Resumo Profissional
%
%   %%SUMMARY_BODY%%
%       Full summary paragraph (translated).
%
%   %%SHIPPED_LABEL%%
%       EN  → Shipped to production:
%       PT  → Apps em produção:
%
%   %%SHIPPED_LIST%%
%       Comma-separated list of shipped apps/products.
%
%   %%SECTION_EXPERIENCE%%
%       EN  → Experience
%       PT  → Experiência
%
%   %%EXPERIENCE_ENTRIES%%
%       One or more \resumeSubheading + \begin{itemize}...\end{itemize} blocks.
%       See the pattern in the EXPERIENCE ENTRY PATTERN section below.
%
%   %%SECTION_EDUCATION%%
%       EN  → Education
%       PT  → Formação
%
%   %%EDUCATION_ENTRIES%%
%       One or more \resumeSubheading blocks (no bullet list needed).
%
%   %%SECTION_SKILLS%%
%       EN  → Technical Skills
%       PT  → Habilidades Técnicas
%
%   %%SKILLS_ENTRIES%%
%       One \item per skill category. See the SKILLS ENTRY PATTERN below.
%
% ============================================================
% EXPERIENCE ENTRY PATTERN:
%
%   \resumeSubheading
%       {Job Title}{Date Range}
%       {Company / Context}{}
%       \begin{itemize}
%           \resumeItem{Bullet one.}
%           \resumeItem{Bullet two.}
%       \end{itemize}
%
% SKILLS ENTRY PATTERN:
%
%   \item \textbf{Category Label:} skill, skill, skill
%
% ============================================================

\documentclass[11pt,letterpaper]{article}

% ----- Core packages -----
\usepackage[margin=0.75in]{geometry}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{fontspec}
%%LANG_SETUP%%

% ----- Font -----
\IfFontExistsTF{Inter}
  {\setmainfont{Inter}[Scale=0.95]}
  {\renewcommand{\familydefault}{\sfdefault}}

% ----- PDF metadata -----
\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=black,
    urlcolor=blue,
    pdfauthor={Luann Luna},
    pdftitle={%%PDF_TITLE%%},
    pdfsubject={%%PDF_SUBJECT%%},
    pdfkeywords={%%PDF_KEYWORDS%%}
}

% ----- Section heading style -----
\titleformat{\section}
    {\large\bfseries}
    {}
    {0pt}
    {}
    [\titlerule]

\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{12pt}{6pt}

% ----- Custom commands -----
\newcommand{\resumeSubheading}[4]{
  \item
    \begin{tabular*}{\linewidth}{l@{\extracolsep{\fill}}r}
      \textbf{#1} & #2 \\
      \textit{#3} & \textit{#4} \\
    \end{tabular*}
}

\newcommand{\resumeItem}[1]{
  \item{#1}
}

% ----- Page style -----
\pagestyle{empty}
\setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=*, itemsep=2pt, topsep=2pt}

\begin{document}

%------- HEADER -------
\begin{center}
    {\LARGE \textbf{Luann Luna}} \\
    \vspace{0.5em}
    %%HEADER_TITLE%% \\
    \vspace{0.2em}
    %%HEADER_LOCATION%% \\
    \vspace{0.3em}
    +55 98 98176-4061 $|$
    \href{mailto:luann.marques@gmail.com}{luann.marques@gmail.com} $|$
    \href{https://linkedin.com/in/luannluna}{linkedin.com/in/luannluna} $|$
    \href{https://github.com/LuannLuna}{github.com/LuannLuna}
\end{center}

\vspace{0.5em}

%------- SUMMARY -------
\section*{%%SECTION_SUMMARY%%}
%%SUMMARY_BODY%%

\vspace{0.35em}
\noindent\textbf{%%SHIPPED_LABEL%%} %%SHIPPED_LIST%%

%------- EXPERIENCE -------
\section*{%%SECTION_EXPERIENCE%%}

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=0.15in]
%%EXPERIENCE_ENTRIES%%
\end{itemize}

%------- EDUCATION -------
\section*{%%SECTION_EDUCATION%%}

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=0.15in]
%%EDUCATION_ENTRIES%%
\end{itemize}

%------- SKILLS -------
\section*{%%SECTION_SKILLS%%}

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=0.15in]
%%SKILLS_ENTRIES%%
\end{itemize}

\end{document}
